series_metadata.series_description: Insurance companies doing business in Ohio (both domestic and foreign, as defined in R.C. 5725.01) must remit a tax to the state based on the percentage of the gross amount of premiums collected in Ohio. This record series includes OAKS revenue documents and other supporting documentation showing the payment and remittance of funds into the proper account.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 3 fiscal years. ; Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 3 fiscal years
